# `conda` (conda ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Handwritten prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly uses this chain when it finds `conda` evidence.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `conda` |
| Ecosystem | `conda` |
| Detector chain | `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `conda-meta/*.json` |
| Ignored directories | - |
| Ignored directory markers | - |
| Multi-module resolution | No |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `syft for bomly-lite` |
